name: knockturn-employee-agent
description: Knockturn Employee Productivity Agent - Desktop App

scripts.clean: node -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist/app', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('dist/electron', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build:electron: tsc --project tsconfig.electron.json && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.join('dist','electron','src'); const dest = path.join('dist','src'); if (fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.rmSync(dest, { recursive: true, force: true }); const copyRecursive = (srcDir, destDir) => { fs.mkdirSync(destDir, { recursive: true }); for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(srcDir, { withFileTypes: true })) { const srcPath = path.join(srcDir, entry.name); const destPath = path.join(destDir, entry.name); if (entry.isDirectory()) copyRecursive(srcPath, destPath); else fs.copyFileSync(srcPath, destPath); } }; copyRecursive(src, dest); } fs.mkdirSync(path.join('dist','electron'), { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('electron/preload.cjs', 'dist/electron/preload.cjs');"
scripts.build:windows: npm run build && npm run copy:env && electron-builder --win --config.directories.output=release
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && npm run copy:env && electron-builder --mac --config.directories.output=release
scripts.copy:env: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const envFile = '.env'; const destDir = path.join('dist'); if (!fs.existsSync(destDir)) fs.mkdirSync(destDir, { recursive: true }); if (fs.existsSync(envFile)) { fs.copyFileSync(envFile, path.join(destDir, envFile)); console.log('✓ Copied .env to dist/'); } else { console.warn('⚠ .env file not found'); }"
